description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a modern, minimalist design, featuring clean white exterior walls and a flat roof. The structure includes several large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The front facade is simple, with a central door and two windows, while the rear side has a single door and a small window. The roof appears to have an open section, possibly for a rooftop garden or patio, with visible greenery and seating. The building sits on a green lawn base, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, with a focus on open, airy spaces and straightforward geometry.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist design, set on a green lawn base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the interior layout with visible furniture and a partial view of the rooftop garden.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entrance, two large windows, and the central section of the flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single door, a small window, and a glimpse of the rooftop greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting a large window and a decorative brick section on the wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple sides
